author: gb9t
content: Iter 106 result: net/core/rtnetlink.md (RTNETLINK message dispatch - rtnetlink.c ~7141 lines; per (protocol, msg-type) RtnlMsgHandler registry via rtnl_register_many + global rtnl_lock mutex serializes per-netdev state mutation + per-link-kind RtnlLinkOps registered via __rtnl_link_register for vlan/bridge/veth/macvlan/wireguard + RTM_NEWLINK/DELLINK/GETLINK/GETSTATS dispatch + IFLA_LINKINFO kind dispatch + per-mcast notify RTNLGRP_LINK/IPV4_IFADDR/IPV4_ROUTE + CAP_NET_ADMIN gating + RTNL_FLAG_DOIT_UNLOCKED/DUMP_UNLOCKED/PERNET/BULK_DEL_SUPPORTED + per-namespace + per-extack populate + iproute2 ABI compat) + virt/kvm/x86-pmu-intel.md (Intel PMU virtualization - pmu_intel.c ~850 lines; per-vCPU CPUID 0x0A architectural-PMU detect + nr_arch_gp_counters x KvmPmc 48-bit + nr_arch_fixed_counters 3 + IA32_PERF_GLOBAL_CTRL/STATUS/OVF_CTRL + IA32_FIXED_CTR_CTRL + IA32_PMC0..N + IA32_EVNTSEL0..N + IA32_FIXED_CTR0..2 + reprogram_counter via host perf_event_create_kernel_counter + PMI on overflow via lapic LVT_PERF_VECTOR + VM_ENTRY/EXIT_LOAD_IA32_PERF_GLOBAL_CTRL auto-load + LBR MSRs + PEBS disabled in v0). 162 Tier-3s total. Next iter: net/core/dev_addr_lists.md (per-netdev addr filter) + virt/kvm/x86-pmu-amd.md cross-check (or pivot).
